title: Swamps +
description: A mod that overhauls the swamp hut, adds a swamp village and fireflies
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fcef28dbe128c821a61c1a03afae4db67b14ed.png)

## Overhauling Swamp Huts, Adding Swamp Villages And Fireflies
![whatadds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a241d6572d84454ea72ae3041689ad1601f2f1_0.webp)
![swampvillage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66f3a558f89b963f3a9bf5de996f199389507676_0.webp)
![hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff27f584ad939afc312d471ad03c8c488a6539c4_0.webp)

What the mod adds:
- Swamp Villages
- Overhauled Swamp Huts
- Fireflies
- Generation Changes To Biome (Mud and Mushrooms)

![video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de147a1b419301fb2b71f949037fa2179214b0c_0.webp)
